title: Sound Painting
description: A no-wrong-feelings music journal where kids stamp colors and pictures for how a sound feels.
learningGoals: Notice emotional responses to musical qualities
Build vocabulary for slow, soft, boomy, fast, tickly, gentle, and sleepy sounds
Connect sound, color, and image through creative choice
interactionModel: observe-journal tap color swatches and picture stickers to record sound feelings
feedbackModel: Every feeling choice is accepted with pop and sparkle SFX plus an affirming spoken line; the recap replays the painting choices.
credits: Kaigani; emoji and swatch placeholder art only (see ASSETS.md). Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
